title: dysoxylum nutans
intro: Dysoxylum nutans, also known as the Himalayan ironwood, is a plant species belonging to the family Meliaceae, native to the Himalayan regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The extracts from the plant have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. Dysoxylum nutans is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its bark is also used to make a powder that can be consumed for its medicinal properties.
